keywords.description: Vulnerable creatures take 50% more damage from Attacks.

cards.name: Sword Boomerang
cards.description: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 3 times.

cards.name: Juggling
cards.description: Add a copy of the third Attack you play each turn into your Hand.
